'''Mairne''',<ref name="TDC" /> situated within the [[Star system/Legends|system]] of the [[Mairne system/Legends|same name]],<ref name="DarkStryder note" /> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]<ref name="TDC" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Online Companion" /> Connected to the neighboring planets of [[Charis]] and [[Gandle Ott]] by [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlanes]], Mairne was located just off the [[Trition Trade Route]] that ran through the [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="TDC" /> By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' to "eight years after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]," for a date of [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].</ref> the world supported a small [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] whose economy was based around supplying [[Ore/Legends|ore]] and natural resources to Gandle Ott.<ref name="TDC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mairne was featured in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'', a [[1995]] supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]]. Mairne was not featured directly in any adventure, but was included to give background information on worlds within the Kathol sector.<ref name="TDC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Mairne system, and therefore the planet Mairne, in grid square M-21.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
